title: 1 step DFU - Language update when both EB and CC have updates
scenario: 1-step DFU for language change updates both Earbuds and Charge Case firmware and applies selected language on Osprey device
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Ensure Osprey Earbuds (EB) and Charge Case (CC) are connected, both on firmware version 5039 or later.
3. Verify that firmware updates are available for both the earbuds and the charge case.
4. Navigate to Device Settings → [Device Name] → Language.
5. Select a desired language from the list.
7. Observe that the Software Update screen is displayed.
8. Wait for the language change DFU (Device Firmware Update) to complete.
9. After completion, verify the earbuds and charge case firmware version is the latest.
10. On the charge case, navigate through the touch screen menus to confirm the language has changed to the selected language.
expected: After completing the language change DFU, both the earbuds and charge case are on the latest firmware, and the charge case touch screen menus display the newly selected language.
